allow: PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 5173 is free" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\FlowScript_Windows\\flowscript-react"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "electron", "test-main.cjs" -NoNewWindow -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $proc.Kill\(\); if \(Test-Path "test-debug.txt"\) { Get-Content "test-debug.txt" } else { "test-debug.txt not created" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\FlowScript_Windows\\flowscript-react"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "test-main.cjs" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Test-Path "test-debug.txt"\) { Get-Content "test-debug.txt" } else { "not created" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\FlowScript_Windows\\flowscript-react"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "test-main2.cjs" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Test-Path "test-debug2.txt"\) { Get-Content "test-debug2.txt" } else { "test-debug2.txt not created" })

PowerShell(cd "d:\\FlowScript_Windows\\flowscript-react"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "test-raw.js" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Test-Path "test-raw-out.txt"\) { Get-Content "test-raw-out.txt" } else { "not created" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "d:\\FlowScript_Windows\\flowscript-react\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\" -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, @{N="SizeMB";E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\FlowScript_Windows\\flowscript-react"; $env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE = ''; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\node_modules\\electron\\dist\\electron.exe" -ArgumentList "test-raw.js" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; if \(Test-Path "test-raw-out.txt"\) { Get-Content "test-raw-out.txt" } else { "not created" })
PowerShell(cd d:\\FlowScript_Windows\\flowscript-react; npm run electron:dev 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath "$env:TEMP\\fs_debug.txt")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'electron|FlowScript|node' } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle, CPU)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne '' })
